# Checklist

- [ ] The change is reusable beyond one private context, or the local context is clearly explained.
- [ ] The language is clear for newcomers.
- [ ] Acronyms are defined.
- [ ] No sensitive, private, or identifiable information is included.
- [ ] Licensing is compatible with the repository license.
